summary: Ukrainian forces destroyed a Russian TOS-1A MLRS using a Bulava loitering munition followed by FPV drones, while the 2nd Battalion of the 35th Marine Brigade reported ongoing operations against Russian UAVs. In the Donbas and Krasny Liman directions, the Russian "Rubicon" Center claimed 112 targets destroyed on April 20, 2026, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs, coordinating with Russian Aerospace Forces. Ukrainian operators from the "TerMIT" unit evacuated a wounded soldier from the 3rd Mechanized Battalion "Fireflies," and FPV drones killed Russian soldiers attempting to assault Ukrainian positions on motorcycles and another who feigned surrender before fleeing.
